findings.description: The override value table entry adds "（yyyyMMdd形式）" to the description of the override value, but the source table only says "上書きしたい日付" without specifying the format for the override mechanism.
findings.source_evidence: Source table: キー=「BasicBusinessDateProvider. + "区分"」, 値=「上書きしたい日付」 — no format constraint is stated for the override value in this context.

findings.description: PascalCase class name `DbConnectionContext` appears in the section content (in the `dbTransactionName` property explanation) but is not included in the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Knowledge s6 content: 「デフォルトのトランザクション名（`DbConnectionContext.getConnection()`）を使用する場合は省略可能。`DbConnectionContext.getConnection("appTransactionName")`のように引数を指定する場合はその引数値を設定する。」

findings.description: PascalCase class name `SystemRepository` appears in the code example but is not included in the hints array.
